creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
the world is full of wonderful things you haven’t seen yet ✨🦆🏘️🏞️🛖🇯🇵✨ & these are the 3 places you must visit in #Kyoto with @kkdaysg 

🇯🇵Kyoto #Amanohashidate Day Tour: @kkdaysg 

📍1. Ine Bay - charming fishing village of Ine is home to distinctive boathouses that line the bay, offering you a historical perspective

📍2. Amanohashidate - is a pine-covered sandbar famous for having one of Japan’s three scenic views. This natural bridge links both sides of Miyazu Bay in northern Kyoto Prefecture, & is part of a national park. We took a cable car to the look out point 

📍3. Miyama Thatched House No Sato - the whole village is composed of old thatched houses and is carefully maintained as a cultural heritage site

#kkdaytravelquestkansai #kkdaysg #kkdaytravelquest 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#visitjapan #japantravel #traveljapan #inebay #miyamathatchedvillage #dotzsoh #explorewithkkday
